cases.prompt: Set up automated backups using spatie/laravel-backup with S3 storage and Slack notifications
cases.expect: Installs package, publishes config, configures S3 disk, sets schedule in Kernel, adds environment variables for AWS and Slack webhook

cases.prompt: I need to configure backups for production. Want database-only backups daily at 2am with email notifications.
cases.expect: Configures backup-setup with --db-only flag, schedules at 02:00, enables mail notifications
